appraisal_events.evidence: « Bloch lui coupa la parole. – Vraiment… je ne savais absolument pas cela – comme s’il était étrange qu’il ne le sût pas. »
appraisal_events.explanation: Bloch is shown as boorish and pretentious: he interrupts the historian and affects a pedantic surprise, which the narrator explicitly ironizes.

status_effects.explanation: He loses esteem by appearing impolite and vain under the narrator’s ironic gaze.
